# Pull Request

## Description
- [ ] Brief description of the change (bug fix or feature)
- [ ] Link to related issue/ticket (if applicable)
- [ ] Steps to reproduce the bug (if fixing)
- [ ] Expected vs. current behavior (if fixing)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Changes Made
- [ ] Explanation of implemented fix/feature
- [ ] Screenshots/videos (if applicable)

## Testing
- [ ] Added unit tests
- [ ] Tested manually
- [ ] Verified in development environment
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed
- [ ] No new bugs introduced

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated documentation if required
- [ ] Added comments to code where necessary

## Review
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Changes are focused and minimal
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

## Additional Notes
<!-- Add any additional information or context for reviewers -->
